title: Airbnb Stock Investors Activity & Sentiment
text: ABNB's investor sentiment is negative, according to TipRanks data. Additionally, only 0.4% of TipRanks' retail investors changed their holding of ABNB in the last 7 days, suggesting relatively low trading activity among retail investors. Current sentiment indicators show bearish positioning with elevated fear levels among investors. However, this contrasts with some positive signals: Airbnb's recent performance shows strong revenue growth and positive analyst sentiment, with analysts raising price targets indicating confidence in Airbnb's operational momentum. Current analyst ratings show 20% of firms recommending Buy or Strong Buy, 47% Hold, and 33% Sell or Strong Sell. Regulatory headwinds, negative public sentiment, and housing market criticisms threaten Airbnb's growth prospects and restrict market expansion. Airbnb investors allocate an average of 3.85% to ABNB, based on 799,702 active investor portfolios.
